name: @speedora/fusion-ml
description: Fusion Engine v3 Foundation (Milestone 2A) - ML abstractions (FeatureVector/TrainingSample/PredictionResult/RankingResult/ModelMetadata), interfaces only (FeatureExtractor/DatasetBuilder/ModelTrainer/ModelEvaluator/Predictor), a model registry, a training-pipeline skeleton, and an offline evaluation framework (Precision@K/Recall@K/Spearman/NDCG). No real ML model, no DB/queue access, no caller anywhere in apps/worker or apps/api yet - see docs/ai/fusion-v3.md. Fusion Engine v2 (@speedora/fusion-engine) remains the only engine in production.
